meta.method: Web search + LinkedIn public profile/company previews (no login). Multiple /in/ URLs per fund where team was verified.

7 Seas Ventures.note: Crunchbase / web: Seven Seas Venture Partners (Menlo Park) behind 7seasvc.com; partner profiles verified via LinkedIn preview (Seven Seas Partners in headline or experience).

Amaranthine Partners.note: David Kelly LinkedIn lists General Partner at Amaranthine (company slug semblevc); Patrick Murphy co-founder Tapestry VC same lineage per press/Crunchbase.

Arcus Ventures.note: Oncology VC arcusventures.com team; Steven Soignet Founding GP and Chad Hellmann CFO verified on LinkedIn previews.

Authentic Ventures.note: Arthur Johnson Venture Partner; Briana Billingham Chief of Staff — both list Authentic Ventures Oakland.

Autochrome Ventures.note: Public team page + LinkedIn: Vaughn Blake Managing Director at Autochrome Ventures (also Blue Bear Capital).

Be Great Partners.note: LinkedIn company employee list + profile previews: Kelly Mi Li General Partner; Aleksandra Stojkovic Account Manager.
